OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Apr-06-2016 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion To Strike
Off Calendar Feb-19-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. EVAN A. CHAN, ESQ. of Hedani, Choy, Spalding & Salvagione, LLP, Tel No. 415-778-0800 appearing for the Plaintiff;
Atty. PAUL J. MCDONALD, ESQ. of Simoncini & Associates, Tel No. 408-280-7711 appearing for Defendants Golden Gate Bridge Highway and Transportation.

Matter was argued and submitted by counsel. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE BRIDGE HIGHWAY AND TRANSPORTATION'S Motion To Strike the wage loss, property damage and loss of earning capacity allegations is denied. Defendant is equitably estopped from seeking this relief due to the wording of its claim form. A reasonable person reading the claim form could reasonably believe that question 7 asking for a "Description of Claimant's injury, damage or loss as of the date of this claim" would be satisfactorily answered, in the context of a pedestrian/motor vehicle accident, by providing information about the claimant's physical injuries without additional information, even if the claimant also suffered wage loss, property damage and loss of earning capacity. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/HK)

Notice Of Motion To Strike
Off Calendar Jan-28-2016 Continued To Feb-18-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE BRIDGE HIGHWAY AND TRANSPORTATION'S Motion To Strike is continued to February 18, 2016 at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 302, to give Defendant an opportunity to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.7B. Defendant must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date, no later than January 28, 2016, at 4:00 p.m. The Court has the opposition papers.

Judge: Ernest Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/EG)
